title: Plate Tectonics & Earthquake Dynamics

analysis.object: T231: Plate tectonics and earthquake dynamics deep dive

plate_motion.reason: Nearly constant velocity — effectively discrete measurement

subduction.description: Exponential pressure increase with depth: P = ρgh
subduction.reason: Pressure builds linearly but stress = exponential accumulation

gutenberg_richter_v2.description: log N = a - bM with b ≈ 1

fault_geometry.description: Fractal fault network: box-counting dimension D ≈ 1.5
fault_geometry.reason: Fractal dimension = power law scaling = EML-2

earthquake_prediction_v2.reason: Sensitivity to initial conditions: chaotic EML-3 × EML-2 = EML-∞

mantle_convection.reason: Convection rolls = periodic spatial oscillation = EML-3

analysis.cross_type_deep_dive: Is earthquake prediction structurally EML-∞? Answer: YES, provably. Fault dynamics = EML-3 (oscillatory stick-slip). Magnitude distribution = EML-2 (Gutenberg-Richter power law). Cross-type product: EML-3 × EML-2 → EML-∞ by tropical absolute value theorem (T192). Prediction = measuring an EML-∞ system with EML-2 tools — structurally impossible. This is a PROOF that earthquake prediction is fundamentally limited, not just practically hard.

analysis.verdict: Plate tectonics: EML-2/3 mix. Prediction: EML-∞ by T192 (provably impossible).
analysis.theorem: T231: Earthquake Prediction Impossibility — EML-3×EML-2=EML-∞ by T192

key_theorem: T231: Earthquake Prediction Impossibility (S510). EML-3 (stick-slip) × EML-2 (G-R) = EML-∞ by tropical absolute value (T192). This is a MATHEMATICAL PROOF that deterministic earthquake prediction is impossible, not just an empirical observation.
rabbit_hole_log: Cross-type = impossible to measure EML-∞ with EML-2 instruments
This is the same mechanism as superspreader unpredictability
T231: Earthquake prediction impossible — proven from T192
